issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack phase), not 'OnAttacked' (when this card is attacked). The effect activates 'On Your Opponent's Attack', which is the attack declaration/phase trigger.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' condition. The text explicitly states '[Once Per Turn]', which should be represented as a condition (e.g., 'TurnCount' or similar once-per-turn limiter).

Action sequence is incorrect. TrashFromHand should be conditional (optional 'You may trash'), not mandatory. The power boost should only apply if a card is trashed. Current structure doesn't reflect the optional nature or the conditional dependency.
The PowerBoost action should be nested inside a conditional/optional structure or placed in thenActions of the trash action, so the boost only occurs when a card is trashed.
